examples: Results showed the arsenic can be quickly absorbed onto loessial soil and reach adsorption saturation.
For Cultivated Loessial Soil, Dark Loessial Soil and Yellow-brown Soil, the advance distance decreased as silt content increased.
The dark loessial soil (Heilutu) is not only a main zonal soil group in the loess plateau of northwestern China, but an ancient cultivated soil.
